mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, invoice_no_org, supplier_no, imp_date, order_no, model_no, quantity, price_org, amount_org, currency, price_rmb, amount_rmb, prod_country, customs_fee, vat_fee, trans_fee, other_fee, imp_type, order_type, amount_total, price_total, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._shoplist
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._shoplist (id, invoice_id, invoice_no_org, supplier_no, imp_date, order_no, model_no, quantity, price_org, amount_org, currency, price_rmb, amount_rmb, prod_country, customs_fee, vat_fee, trans_fee, other_fee, imp_type, order_type, amount_total, price_total, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNoOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{priceOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{impType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo._shoplist
id,
invoice_id,
invoice_no_org,
supplier_no,
imp_date,
order_no,
model_no,
quantity,
price_org,
amount_org,

other_fee,
imp_type,
order_type,
amount_total,
price_total,
create_time,
update_time,
create_user,
update_user,

mapper.update:
update dbo._shoplist
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no_org = #{record.invoiceNoOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_no = #{record.supplierNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price_org = #{record.priceOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_org = #{record.amountOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
currency = #{record.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price_rmb = #{record.priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_rmb = #{record.amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
prod_country = #{record.prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customs_fee = #{record.customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vat_fee = #{record.vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
imp_type = #{record.impType,jdbcType=CHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
amount_total = #{record.amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_total = #{record.priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._shoplist set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no_org = #{record.invoiceNoOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_no = #{record.supplierNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_date = #{record.impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price_org = #{record.priceOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_org = #{record.amountOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, currency = #{record.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price_rmb = #{record.priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_rmb = #{record.amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, prod_country = #{record.prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customs_fee = #{record.customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vat_fee = #{record.vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trans_fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_type = #{record.impType,jdbcType=CHAR}, order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, amount_total = #{record.amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, price_total = #{record.priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo._shoplist
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no_org = #{invoiceNoOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_no = #{supplierNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price_org = #{priceOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_org = #{amountOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
currency = #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price_rmb = #{priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amount_rmb = #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
prod_country = #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
imp_type = #{impType,jdbcType=CHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
amount_total = #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
price_total = #{priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo._shoplist set invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no_org = #{invoiceNoOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_no = #{supplierNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_date = #{impDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price_org = #{priceOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_org = #{amountOrg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, currency = #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price_rmb = #{priceRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_rmb = #{amountRmb,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, prod_country = #{prodCountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_type = #{impType,jdbcType=CHAR}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, amount_total = #{amountTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, price_total = #{priceTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
